item.title: CLI v3.0.24
item.description: - Plugin commands can now submit prompts to the agent - Added support for overriding the API base URL - Open the verification URL automatically when starting device authentication - Enforced a single shared Cline Hub, so a stale hub is respawned after an upgrade - Suppressed flickering console windows on Windows - Fixed truncation of structured tool operation result strings so oversized tool output stays within limits - Stopped echoing the full command text in run_commands tool results **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/cline/cline/compare/cli-v3.0.23...cli-v3.0.24

item.title: v3.89.2
item.description: ### Fixed - Complete the fix for the Anthropic provider on VS Code 1.123 and later by upgrading the bundled Anthropic SDK to a release compatible with the Node 24 runtime. - Update the Vertex AI provider to a compatible Anthropic Vertex SDK release so it works with the upgraded Anthropic SDK. **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/cline/cline/compare/v3.89.1...v3.89.2

item.title: v3.89.1
item.description: ### Fixed - Restore the Anthropic provider on VS Code 1.123 and later, where the updated Node 24 runtime broke the bundled Anthropic SDK. - Handle the DeepSeek V4 reasoning format. **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/cline/cline/compare/cli-v3.0.23...v3.89.1

item.title: CLI v3.0.23
item.description: - Fixed Vertex AI GCP settings configuration - Fixed the Azure Foundry API version - Added support for configured agents as subagent tools - Centralized OAuth management into the SDK - Fixed an error caused by disabled reasoning on Fable 5 **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/cline/cline/compare/cli-v3.0.22...cli-v3.0.23

item.title: v3.89.0
item.description: ### Added - Add Claude Fable 5 model support. ### Fixed - Fix MiniMax M3 thinking controls across gateways. ### Changed - Clean up the Codex model list. **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/cline/cline/compare/cli-v3.0.21...v3.89.0

item.title: CLI v3.0.22
item.description: - Added support for the Claude Fable 5 model - Fixed MiniMax M3 thinking controls so they route correctly across gateways **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/cline/cline/compare/cli-v3.0.21...cli-v3.0.22

item.title: CLI v3.0.21
item.description: - Added a global auto-update setting that controls automatic updates on CLI startup - Added a Cline credits refill link - Fixed scrolling for inline ask-question responses - Fixed connector thread session routing and stale hub session handling - Added support for Vertex AI Application Default Credentials (ADC) with tool use - Fixed empty message content replay for Bedrock - Cleaned up the OpenAI Codex model list **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/cline/cline/compare/cli-v3.0.20...cli-v3.0.21

item.title: v3.88.1
item.description: ### Added - Add a debug section in settings for Cline testers. ### Fixed - Include the walkthrough markdown files in the VS Code extension package so the first-run walkthrough steps load correctly. **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/cline/cline/compare/v3.88.0...v3.88.1

item.title: v3.88.0
item.description: ### Added - Add the latest Fireworks AI serverless models and update the default Fireworks model to Kimi K2.6. ### Fixed - Fix MCP server delete/add flows so settings writes do not cause the MCP server list to be emptied by the file watcher. - Remove stale Fireworks AI models and correct Fireworks model metadata and cache pricing. ### Changed - Always use the upstream Cline recommended models endpoint instead of gating it behind a feature flag. **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/cline/cline/compare/cli-v3.0.20...v3.88.0

item.title: CLI v3.0.20
item.description: - Installed plugin wrappers are now named from their source (npm package name, git repo, remote filename, official slug, or local directory) instead of an opaque hash, making installed plugins easier to identify. **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/cline/cline/compare/cli-v3.0.19...cli-v3.0.20

item.title: CLI v3.0.19
item.description: - Fixed CLI auto-update to use npm update so updates apply reliably, while preserving the installed release channel (e.g. nightly). **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/cline/cline/compare/cli-v3.0.18...cli-v3.0.19

item.title: CLI v3.0.18
item.description: - Fix Slack channel mentions so replies post in the original message's thread. - Fix the abort indicator to clear immediately when a task is cancelled. - Sync the Fireworks AI model registry and refresh the bundled model catalog with current platform offerings. - Bump the bundled SDK to v0.0.43, which forces a running Cline Hub to restart so it picks up the latest SDK code. **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/cline/cline/compare/cli-v3.0.17...cli-v3.0.18

item.title: CLI v3.0.17
item.description: - Fix a regression introduced in 3.0.15 where the interactive CLI could get stuck after stopping and restarting Cline Hub and then pressing Escape to cancel a request. The CLI now detects stale or missing sessions, recovers any pending messages, and starts a fresh session instead of failing with "session not found". - Fix Ctrl+C and Hub shutdown races that surfaced as "hook dispatch failed" and WebSocket connection errors from late hook events racing against Hub shutdown. - Fix the Hub daemon being shut down prematurely when a runtime request was aborted, so the daemon now stays alive. - Improve the Telegram connector with a new --allowed-user-id flag to restrict which Telegram users are authorized to interact with the agent. **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/cline/cline/compare/cli-v3.0.16...cli-v3.0.17

item.title: v3.87.0
item.description: ### Added - Add MiniMax M3 model support. ### Fixed - Update VS Code extension dependencies to resolve security issues in @xmldom/xmldom, basic-ftp, axios, undici, and other direct/transitive packages. **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/cline/cline/compare/v3.86.2...v3.87.0

item.title: CLI v3.0.16
item.description: - Install official Cline plugins by slug off the new github.com/cline/plugins collection. - Uninstall plugins using cline plugin uninstall or in the TUI. - Plugins can now bundle skills, and plugin skills are grouped together in settings. - Add Slack socket mode support. - Allow a custom base URL for Anthropic vendor-type providers. - Fix OAuth token migration for users signed in through the old extension. - Use a union schema for read-files tool input validation. - Add a CLINE_PLUGIN_IMPORT_TIMEOUT_MS env override to control the plugin import timeout. **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/cline/cline/compare/cli-v3.0.15...cli-v3.0.16

item.title: v3.86.2
item.description: ### Fixed - Fix @ file mentions and workspace file search on VS Code 1.122+ by resolving the new bundled @vscode/ripgrep-universal per-platform binary layout before falling back to legacy ripgrep paths. **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/cline/cline/compare/v3.86.1...v3.86.2

item.title: v3.86.1
item.description: ### Fixed - Fix @ file mentions failing to find files in some environments (notably VS Code Remote SSH, and after certain VS Code updates) by keeping the file-search fallback alive when the workspace index or bundled ripgrep binary is unavailable. **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/cline/cline/compare/cli-v3.0.15...v3.86.1

item.title: CLI v3.0.15
item.description: - Add Cline Hub, a web app for monitoring connected clients, viewing and driving sessions, streaming assistant output, and restarting the local hub, with local, LAN, and tunnel usage gated by a room secret. - Support global AGENTS rules so agent rules can be applied across all sessions, not just per-project. - Let plugins contribute static or dynamic rule content when installed in the sandbox. - Bind Discord sessions to individual message authors so different Discord users no longer share chat state in a thread. - Support participant mute targets in Discord: resolve /mute and /unmute from user mentions or raw user IDs to mute a specific participant in a thread. - Make OAuth URLs clickable in the TUI. - Refresh the bundled model catalog, adding Claude Opus 4.8, Moonshot Kimi K2.6, and Qwen3.7 Max (with cache support). - Discover SDK skill directories that are symlinked, including handling circular symlinks. - Steer active connector sessions across turn keys by matching on session ID, so replies continue the existing session instead of starting a duplicate. - Stop the Discord connector after repeated identical errors (per thread, within a time window) to prevent error messages from flooding a channel. - Fix Discord connector registration and reply fallback handling. - Fix SAP AI Core to use the AI SDK community provider. - Log ACP output as diagnostics instead of errors so normal output no longer appears as errors. **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/cline/cline/compare/cli-v3.0.14...cli-v3.0.15

item.title: v3.86.0
item.description: ### Added - Add Claude Opus 4.8 provider support, including 1M-context variants where available. - Add Moonshot Kimi K2.6 model support. ### Fixed - Show prompt-cache support for Qwen 3.7 Max in the Cline provider. - Fix the VS Code nightly publish workflow startup permissions. ### Changed - Move the VS Code extension project into apps/vscode. **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/cline/cline/compare/cli-v3.0.14...v3.86.0

item.title: CLI v3.0.14
item.description: - Fix OTEL telemetry variable bundling so telemetry is correctly enabled in compiled CLI builds: guard against environments where process.env is undefined and remove optional chaining so bundlers can inline the values at build time. **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/cline/cline/compare/cli-v3.0.13...cli-v3.0.14

item.title: v3.85.0
item.description: ### Added - Add GPT-5.5 support to SAP AI Core. - Add DeepSeek V4 Flash and Pro models. - Add Gemini 3.5 Flash to Gemini and Vertex providers. - Add /lg-task URI webhook integration for LG dashboard flows. ### Fixed - Fix Vertex AI global endpoint handling for Claude models. - Route Poolside Laguna models through next-gen prompts and native tool calling. ### Changed - Update diff and protobufjs dependencies. **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/cline/cline/compare/cli-v3.0.13...v3.85.0

item.title: CLI v3.0.13
item.description: - Show a loading dialog while resuming a session from history so the TUI no longer appears frozen during the load. - Speed up the /clear command by deferring new session creation until you send the next prompt, so clearing no longer blocks on spinning up an empty session. **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/cline/cline/compare/cli-v3.0.12...cli-v3.0.13

item.title: CLI v3.0.12
item.description: - Show a loading dialog while the config screen switches provider or model so the transition no longer looks frozen. - Render the ask question tool prompt inline with the conversation so the question and suggested answers stay attached to the assistant turn that asked them, instead of appearing in a separate modal. - Allow manual cline update runs to install the latest published version immediately, bypassing the release age gate that delays automatic updates. - Refresh the bundled SDK to 0.0.42, updating the model catalog. **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/cline/cline/compare/cli-v3.0.11...cli-v3.0.12

item.title: CLI v3.0.11
item.description: - Fix a regression in the ChatGPT OAuth provider where requests failed with max_output_tokens not supported, by restoring the full output token budget instead of applying an implicit cap. - Hide the Space toggle hint in the config footer when the highlighted row is not toggleable (rules, agents, hooks). - Authenticate Vertex Gemini through Google auth when gcp.projectId is configured, and surface the full Vertex model list instead of only Claude models. - Include tool names in tool result content blocks so message logs and session history consistently track which tool produced each result. **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/cline/cline/compare/cli-v3.0.10...cli-v3.0.11

item.title: CLI v3.0.10
item.description: - Install plugins from file:// URLs in addition to npm and git sources. - Show Ollama API key note in TUI settings so users know when to provide an API key. - Keep interactive sessions alive when idle or awaiting approval instead of treating them as ended, and stop reading message files for every session when hydrate: false. - Add Poolside as a provider. - Add Gemini 3.5 Flash to the Gemini provider model list. - Auto-detect Telegram bot username from the bot token so the Telegram connector no longer requires it to be configured separately. - Notify connectors when a scheduled execution fails, not just when it succeeds. - Bake OTEL telemetry variables into the CLI at build time so telemetry works in nightly and production builds. - Preserve model output token limits from the SDK model catalog so context window math matches the upstream provider. - Soften the visual treatment of rejected tool calls in the TUI. - Hide the skills tool from the system prompt when skills are disabled, and refresh slash commands after toggling a skill. - Restore AWS Bedrock profile-based auth during legacy config migration so profiles set via awsAuthentication: "profile" are preserved without awsUseProfile. - Cache global settings reads keyed by file mtime so repeated reads skip the JSON parse and zod validation on the hot path. **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/cline/cline/compare/cli-v3.0.9...cli-v3.0.10

item.title: CLI v3.0.9
item.description: - Speed up CLI startup with plugins by loading sandboxed plugins concurrently and caching plugin tool descriptors per plugin, provider, and model. - Speed up plugin and tool config toggles by updating the TUI optimistically and persisting changes without reloading the full config or reimporting plugins. - Restore fuzzy ranking for the @-mention file picker so the most relevant files appear first. - Keep the interactive CLI session alive after cancelling a task instead of tearing the session down. - Accept dash-prefixed prompts when passed after --, so prompts starting with - are no longer parsed as flags. - Recover from hub abort cleanup failures so a cancel that hits an error no longer crashes the runtime host. - Route GLM thinking through provider metadata so thinking-enabled GLM models behave correctly through the gateway. **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/cline/cline/compare/cli-v3.0.8...cli-v3.0.9

item.title: CLI v3.0.8
item.description: - Use Telegram numeric participant ids so renamed users stay linked to the same participant in the Telegram connector. - Keep failed plugins visible in the config UI with their load/setup phase and error details so broken plugin definitions are easier to diagnose. - Move the Create Session Fork shortcut from Opt+F to Opt+R so terminal word-right navigation works again. - Fix AWS Bedrock region and profile detection in the CLI onboarding, and surface bearer-token and additional Bedrock config fields in the provider config screens. - Fix inflated token usage counts caused by AgentRuntime.execute() not resetting usage between calls, which the local runtime host was then double-counting on top of the session baseline. **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/cline/cline/compare/cli-v3.0.7...cli-v3.0.8

item.title: v3.84.0
item.description: ### Added - Add SAP AI Core support for additional hosted models ### Fixed - Disable the MCP "Restart Server" button when a server is toggled off. ### Changed - Remove the Cline Kanban launch modal and bundled demo media from the VS Code extension startup flow. **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/cline/cline/compare/cli-v3.0.7...v3.84.0

item.title: CLI v3.0.7
item.description: - Skip the ChatGPT OAuth model refresh on session startup so the CLI launches without the extra network round-trip. - Align the ChatGPT OAuth model catalog with the Codex provider list so the available models match the subscription tier. Full Changelog: https://github.com/cline/cline/compare/cli-v3.0.6...cli-v3.0.7

item.title: CLI v3.0.6
item.description: - Fix ChatGPT provider model list to include the codex variants and the gpt-5.2, gpt-5.4, and gpt-5.4-mini subscription models. Full Changelog: https://github.com/cline/cline/compare/cli-v3.0.5...cli-v3.0.6

item.title: CLI v3.0.5
item.description: - Show plugin-provided tools and slash commands in the CLI settings dialog by hydrating them through the sandbox. - Preserve hydrated plugin tools and config reload options when toggling settings, so they no longer disappear after a toggle. Full Changelog: https://github.com/cline/cline/compare/cli-v3.0.4...cli-v3.0.5

item.title: CLI v3.0.4
item.description: - Improve light theme TUI colors so chat, status bar, tool output, and syntax highlighting render with better contrast on light terminals. - Fix plugin tools failing in the production npm build by bundling the SDK deps plugins import at runtime. Full Changelog: https://github.com/cline/cline/compare/cli-v3.0.3...cli-v3.0.4

item.title: CLI v3.0.3
item.description: - Add --worktree flag that auto-creates a fresh git worktree under ~/.cline/worktrees/ and runs the task there. Works with --taskId and --continue so you can resume a task in an isolated worktree to try a different approach. - Show session status in the CLI history view and refresh status rows in place while the standalone history TUI is open. - Restore the OpenAI compatible provider in the auth flow and preserve stored model metadata when configuring or migrating OpenAI-compatible providers. - Fix dropped macOS screenshots when pasting them into the TUI or asking the agent to read them: paths containing U+202F (narrow no-break space) and other Unicode variants now resolve to the real file instead of failing with ENOENT. - Accept bearer token auth for AWS Bedrock and map AWS profiles correctly when configuring the Bedrock gateway. - Honor --thinking none for Ollama models that ship with reasoning enabled by default. - Recover from detached hub event errors instead of crashing the session. - Refine the shared system prompt with clearer guidance on tool output formatting, unsupported file reads, long-running shell commands, and final verification before completing a task. Full Changelog: https://github.com/cline/cline/compare/cli-v3.0.2...cli-v3.0.3

item.title: v3.83.0
item.description: ### Fixed - Show a clear "Searching..." state in the @-mention file picker - Improve @-mention file search performance - Allow write_to_file to create or overwrite files with empty content. - Fix validation failures for MCP servers that require an object. - Enable OpenRouter prompt cache control for Qwen models. - Update Axios and SAP Connectivity dependencies ### Changed - Use the VS Code-specific README.marketplace.md when packaging and publishing the VS Code extension - Add telemetry to @-mention search to help diagnose local, remote, and multi-root workspace search behavior. **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/cline/cline/compare/cli-v3.0.2...v3.83.0

item.title: CLI v3.0.2
item.description: - Fix token count display showing inflated numbers in the TUI. Full Changelog: https://github.com/cline/cline/compare/cli-v3.0.1...cli-v3.0.2

item.title: CLI v3.0.1
item.description: - Fix CLI release cleanup scripts so they work correctly on Windows. - Fix the kanban migration notice wording in the TUI. Full Changelog: https://github.com/cline/cline/compare/cli-v3.0.0...cli-v3.0.1

item.title: CLI v3.0.0
item.description: Introducing our new Cline CLI built on our new SDK and comes with a snappy new TUI. Install: For nightly builds:

item.title: v3.82.0
item.description: ### Added - Restore VS Code foreground terminal support and settings. - Add latest OpenAI, SAP AI Core, and Z AI models. ### Fixed - Fix hook template JSON escaping. - Improve ripgrep file search error handling. ### Changed - Remove hardcoded model lists from docs. **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/cline/cline/compare/v2.17.0-cli...v3.82.0

item.title: v3.81.0
item.description: ### Added - Add GPT-5.5 model support for OpenAI Codex subscription users. ### Fixed - Remove hardcoded "What’s New" fallback items in webview; only remote-configured welcome banners are shown. ### Changed - Improve cline-core memory diagnostics used by the extension runtime: - enable near-heap-limit heap snapshots - add periodic memory usage logging - log discovered heap snapshots on abnormal exits for easier OOM debugging **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/cline/cline/compare/v2.16.0-cli...v3.81.0

item.title: v3.80.0
item.description: ### Added - Wire up remote globalSkills from enterprise remote config with full UI, toggle support, and system prompt integration — enterprise-managed skills now appear under a dedicated "Enterprise Skills" section and support alwaysEnabled enforcement - Onboarding flow now uses dynamically fetched recommended models instead of a hardcoded list, with a fallback to the welcome view on failure - Add dedicated "Quota Exceeded" error message in the chat error UI when Cline account spend caps are hit ### Fixed - Fix OOM crashes during long conversations by setting --max-old-space-size=8192 for the cline-core Node.js process (was defaulting to ~2 GB) - Show detailed error information in the chat error row instead of a generic caught error message - Update axios to 1.15.0 across all packages ### Changed - Remove foreground terminal mode — all task command execution now defaults to background mode, removing the VS Code integrated terminal dependency and related settings UI - Remove old hardcoded announcement banners **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/cline/cline/compare/v2.15.0-cli...v3.80.0

item.title: v3.79.0
item.description: ### Added - Add Claude Opus 4.7 model support - Add Azure Blob Storage as a storage provider - Add globalSkills to remote config - Inline value reuse in user-level remote-config discovery ### Fixed - Fix cache reflection for Cline and Vercel API handlers - Fix stuck command_output ask when terminal command ends unexpectedly - Add use_subagents to system prompt for GLM, Hermes, and XS models - Fix action injection security risk ### Changed - Remove deprecated evals tool **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/cline/cline/compare/v2.14.0-cli...v3.79.0

item.title: v3.78.0
item.description: ### Added - Add a dedicated "Spend Limit Reached" error UI when spend caps are hit - Docs updates ### Fixed - Show actual read_file line ranges in chat UI **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/cline/cline/compare/v2.13.0-cli...v3.78.0

item.title: v3.77.0
item.description: ### Added - Add "Lazy Teammate Mode" experimental toggle - read_file tool now supports chunked reading for targeted file access ### Fixed - Exclude new_task tool from system prompt in yolo/headless mode - Fix Kanban demo video formatting ### Changed - Polish Notification hook functionality **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/cline/cline/compare/v3.76.0...v3.77.0

item.title: v3.76.0
item.description: ### Added - Add Cline Kanban launch modal in webview; CLI now launches Kanban by default with a migration view - Add toggle to disable feature tips in chat - Add repeated tool call loop detection to prevent infinite loops wasting tokens ### Fixed - Fix CLI Kanban spawn on Windows by enabling shell mode for npx.cmd **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/cline/cline/compare/v2.11.0-cli...v3.76.0

item.title: v3.75.0
item.description: ### Added - Latency improvements for remote workspaces ### Fixed - Stabilize flaky hooks tests ### Changed - Remove example hooks in favor of reading the docs **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/cline/cline/compare/v2.9.0-cli...v3.75.0

item.title: v3.74.0
item.description: ### Added - Implement dynamic free model detection for Cline API - Add file read deduplication cache to prevent repeated reads - Add feature tips tooltip during thinking state ### Fixed - Replace error message when not logged in to Cline - Align ClineRulesToggleModal padding with ServersToggleModal - Skip WebP for GLM and Devstral models running through llama.cpp - Respect user-configured context window in LiteLLM getModel() - Honor explicit model IDs outside static catalog in W&B provider - Add missing Fireworks serverless models and pricing **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/cline/cline/compare/v2.8.0-cli...v3.74.0

item.title: v3.73.0
item.description: ### Added - Added W&B Inference by CoreWeave as a new API provider with 17 models - Improved parallel tool calling support for OpenRouter and Cline providers ### Fixed - Claude Code Provider: handle rate limit events, empty content arrays, error results, and unknown content types without crashing - Tool handlers (read_file, list_files, list_code_definition_names, search_files) now return graceful errors instead of crashing **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/cline/cline/compare/v2.7.1-cli...v3.73.0

item.title: v3.72.0
item.description: ### Added - Added Anthropic Opus 4.6 fast mode variants ### Fixed - Resolved native tool placeholder interpolation in prompts - Gemini: capped Flash output tokens to 8192 across providers - Fixed Windows unit test path normalization - Fixed flaky hooks tests on Windows - Bedrock: handle thinking and redacted_thinking blocks correctly in message conversion and streaming - Prevent crash when list_files or list_code_definition_names receives a file path ### Changed - Updated Jupyter Notebook GIFs - Markdown image loading now requires user consent - Added .github/copilot-instructions.md for coding agents - Hooks: reintroduced feature toggle **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/cline/cline/compare/v2.6.1-cli...v3.72.0

item.title: v3.71.0
item.description: ### Added - Added GPT-5.4 models for ChatGPT subscription users - Hooks: Added a Notification hook for attention and completion boundaries ### Fixed - Handle streamable HTTP MCP reconnects more reliably after disconnects **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/cline/cline/compare/v2.6.0-cli...v3.71.0

item.title: v3.70.0
item.description: ### Added - New Cline API docs: Getting Started, Auth, Chat Completions, Models, Errors, and SDK Examples - Hook payloads now include model.provider and model.slug - Token/cost updates now happen immediately as usage chunks arrive, not after tool execution ### Fixed - Improve subagent context compaction logic - Subagent stream retry delay increased to reduce noise from transient failures - State serialization errors are now caught and logged instead of crashing - Removed incorrect max_tokens from OpenRouter requests ### Changed - Windows test cleanup now retries on locked files and applies per-test timeouts - Updated hooks docs **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/cline/cline/compare/v2.5.2-cli...v3.70.0

item.title: v3.69.0
item.description: ### Added - Add User-Agent header to requests sent to the Cline backend - Add default auto-tag workflow for publish release flow - Show Cline SDK docs on the Cline page ### Fixed - Retry nested git restore and prevent silent .git_disabled leftovers in checkpoints - Prevent Chinese filename escaping in diff view - Trigger auto-compaction on OpenRouter context overflow errors - Restore GPT-OSS native file editing on OpenAI-compatible models ### Changed - Update Cline SDK docs - Improve hooks support for Windows PowerShell **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/cline/cline/compare/v2.5.1-cli...v3.69.0

item.title: v3.68.0
item.description: ### Added - Add dynamic Cline provider model fetching from Cline endpoint - Add additional Markdown formatting in CLI - Add focus indicator on action buttons in extension ### Fixed - Clear all OCA secrets on auth refresh failure to prevent re-auth loops - Resolve "Could not find the file context" error in Explain Changes - Use JSON_SCHEMA for yaml.load to prevent unsafe deserialization - Fetch model info from API in CLI headless auth for Cline and Vercel providers - Generate commit message from staged changes only when staging exists - Update stale maxTokens values for Claude 3.7+ models across Anthropic, Bedrock, Vertex, and SAP AI Core - Use model.info.maxTokens for OpenRouter instead of hardcoded 8192 ### Changed - Increase timeout for a flaky test to reduce short-term test instability **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/cline/cline/compare/v2.5.0-cli...v3.68.0

item.title: v3.67.1
item.description: ### Added - Added Cline SDK API interface for programmatic access to Cline features and tools, enabling integration into custom applications. - Added Codex 5.3 model support ### Fixed - Fix OpenAI Codex by setting store to false - Use isLocatedInPath() instead of string matching for path containment checks **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/cline/cline/compare/v2.4.3-cli...v3.67.1

item.title: v3.67.0
item.description: ### Added - Add support for skills and optional modelId in subagent configuration - Add AgentConfigLoader for file-based agent configs - Add Responses API support for OpenAI native provider - Preconnect websocket to reduce response latency - Fetch featured models from backend with local fallback - Add /q command to quit CLI - Add MCP enterprise configuration details - Pull Cline's recommended models from internal endpoint - Add dynamic flag to adjust banner cache duration ### Fixed - Fix reasoning delta crash on usage-only stream chunks - Fix OpenAI tool ID transformation restricted to native provider only - Fix auth check for ACP mode - Fix CLI yolo mode to not persist yolo setting to disk - Fix inline focus-chain slider within its feature row - Fix Gemini 3.1 Pro compatibility - Fix Cline auth with ACP flag ### Changed - Move PR skill to .agents/skills - SambaNova provider: update models list - Remove changeset-converter GitHub Action and npm run changeset **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/cline/cline/compare/v2.4.2-cli...v3.67.0

item.title: v3.66.0
item.description: ### Added - Gemini-3.1 Pro Preview **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/cline/cline/compare/v2.4.1-cli...v3.66.0

item.title: v3.65.0
item.description: ### Added - Add /skills slash command to CLI for viewing and managing installed skills ### Fixed - Fix aggressive context compaction caused by accidental clicks on the context window progress bar silently setting a very low auto-condense threshold - Fix infinite retry loop when write_to_file fails with missing content parameter. - Fixed default claude model **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/cline/cline/compare/v2.4.0-cli...v3.65.0

item.title: v3.64.0
item.description: ### Added - added zai GLM 5 Free promo ### Fixed - Restore reasoning trace visibility in chat and improve the thinking row UX so reasoning is visible, then collapsible after completion. **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/cline/cline/compare/v2.2.3-cli...v3.64.0

item.title: v3.63.0
item.description: ### Added - added zai GLM 5 Free promo ### Fixed - Restore reasoning trace visibility in chat and improve the thinking row UX so reasoning is visible, then collapsible after completion. **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/cline/cline/compare/v3.62.0...v3.63.0

item.title: v3.62.0
item.description: ### Fixed - Banners now display immediately when opening the extension instead of requiring user interaction first - Resolved 17 security vulnerabilities including high-severity DoS issues in dependencies (body-parser, axios, qs, tar, and others) **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/cline/cline/compare/v3.61.0...v3.62.0

item.description: - UI/UX fixes with minimax model family **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/cline/cline/compare/v2.2.2-cli...v3.61.0

item.title: v3.59.0
item.description: - Added Minimax 2.5 Free Promo - Fixed Response chaining for OpenAI's Responses API **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/cline/cline/compare/cli-build-024bb65...v3.59.0

item.title: CLI Build (024bb65)
item.description: Automated CLI build from commit 024bb65 Install with:

item.title: v3.58.0
item.description: ### Added - Subagent: replace legacy subagents with the native use_subagents tool - Bundle endpoints.json support so packaged distributions can ship required endpoints out-of-the-box - Amazon Bedrock: support parallel tool calling - New "double-check completion" experimental feature to verify work before marking tasks complete - CLI: new task controls/flags including custom --thinking token budget and --max-consecutive-mistakes for yolo runs - Remote config: new UI/options (including connection/test buttons) and support for syncing deletion of remotely configured MCP servers - Vertex / Claude Code: add 1M context model options for Claude Opus 4.6 - ZAI/GLM: add GLM-5 ### Fixed - CLI: handle stdin redirection correctly in CI/headless environments - CLI: preserve OAuth callback paths during auth redirects - VS Code Web: generate auth callback URLs via vscode.env.asExternalUri (OAuth callback reliability) - Terminal: surface command exit codes in results and improve long-running execute_command timeout behavior - UI: add loading indicator and fix api_req_started rendering - Task streaming: prevent duplicate streamed text rows after completion - API: preserve selected Vercel model when model metadata is missing - Telemetry: route PostHog networking through proxy-aware shared fetch and ensure telemetry flushes on shutdown - CI: increase Windows E2E test timeout to reduce flakiness ### Changed - Settings/model UX: move "reasoning effort" into model configuration and expose it in settings - CLI provider selection: limit provider list to those remotely configured - UI: consolidate ViewHeader component/styling across views - Tools: add auto-approval support for attempt_completion commands - Remotely configured MCP server schema now supports custom headers **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/cline/cline/compare/cli-build-6278382...v3.58.0

item.title: v3.57.1
item.description: ### Fixed - Fixed Opus 4.6 for bedrock provider **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/cline/cline/compare/v3.57.0...v3.57.1

item.title: v3.57.0
item.description: ### Added - Cline CLI 2.0 now available. Install with npm install -g cline - Anthopic Opus 4.6 - Minimax-2.1 and Kimi-k2.5 now available for free for a limited time promo - Codex-5.3 through ChatGPT subscription ### Fixed - Fix read file tool to support reading large files - Fix decimal input crash in OpenAI Compatible price fields (#8129) - Fix build complete handlers when updating the api config - Fixed missing provider from list - Fixed Favorite Icon / Star from getting clipped in the task history view ### Changed - Make skills always enabled and remove feature toggle setting **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/cline/cline/compare/v2.0.5-cli...v3.57.0

item.title: v3.56.2
item.description: ### Added - __CLI authentication:__ Added Vercel AI Gateway and Cline API key provider support for headless CI/automation workflows - __New model:__ Added Kimi-K2.5 model to Moonshot provider (262K context, image support, prompt caching) - __Prompt variant:__ Added Trinity Large prompt variant for improved tool-calling support - __OpenTelemetry:__ Added support for custom headers on metrics and logs endpoints - __Social links:__ Added community icons (X, Discord, GitHub, Reddit, LinkedIn) to the What's New modal ### Fixed - __LiteLLM:__ Fixed thinking configuration not appearing for reasoning-capable models - __OpenTelemetry:__ Fixed endpoint path handling (no longer incorrectly appends /v1/logs or /v1/metrics) and ensured logs are sent regardless of VSCode telemetry settings - __CLI auth:__ Fixed cline auth displaying incorrect provider information after configuration ### Changed - __Hooks:__ Hook scripts now run from the workspace repository root instead of filesystem root - __Default settings:__ Enabled multi-root workspaces, parallel tool calling, and skills by default; disabled strict plan mode by default - __Settings UI:__ Refreshed feature settings section with collapsible design **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/cline/cline/compare/v3.56.1...v3.56.2

item.title: v3.56.1
item.description: ### Added - __CLI authentication:__ Added Vercel AI Gateway and Cline API key provider support for headless CI/automation workflows - __New model:__ Added Kimi-K2.5 model to Moonshot provider (262K context, image support, prompt caching) - __Prompt variant:__ Added Trinity Large prompt variant for improved tool-calling support - __OpenTelemetry:__ Added support for custom headers on metrics and logs endpoints - __Social links:__ Added community icons (X, Discord, GitHub, Reddit, LinkedIn) to the What's New modal ### Fixed - __LiteLLM:__ Fixed thinking configuration not appearing for reasoning-capable models - __OpenTelemetry:__ Fixed endpoint path handling (no longer incorrectly appends /v1/logs or /v1/metrics) and ensured logs are sent regardless of VSCode telemetry settings - __CLI auth:__ Fixed cline auth displaying incorrect provider information after configuration ### Changed - __Hooks:__ Hook scripts now run from the workspace repository root instead of filesystem root - __Default settings:__ Enabled multi-root workspaces, parallel tool calling, and skills by default; disabled strict plan mode by default - __Settings UI:__ Refreshed feature settings section with collapsible design **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/cline/cline/compare/v3.56.0...v3.56.1

item.title: v3.56.0
item.description: ### Added - __CLI authentication:__ Added Vercel AI Gateway and Cline API key provider support for headless CI/automation workflows - __New model:__ Added Kimi-K2.5 model to Moonshot provider (262K context, image support, prompt caching) - __Prompt variant:__ Added Trinity Large prompt variant for improved tool-calling support - __OpenTelemetry:__ Added support for custom headers on metrics and logs endpoints - __Social links:__ Added community icons (X, Discord, GitHub, Reddit, LinkedIn) to the What's New modal ### Fixed - __LiteLLM:__ Fixed thinking configuration not appearing for reasoning-capable models - __OpenTelemetry:__ Fixed endpoint path handling (no longer incorrectly appends /v1/logs or /v1/metrics) and ensured logs are sent regardless of VSCode telemetry settings - __CLI auth:__ Fixed cline auth displaying incorrect provider information after configuration ### Changed - __Hooks:__ Hook scripts now run from the workspace repository root instead of filesystem root - __Default settings:__ Enabled multi-root workspaces, parallel tool calling, and skills by default; disabled strict plan mode by default - __Settings UI:__ Refreshed feature settings section with collapsible design **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/cline/cline/compare/v3.55.0...v3.56.0

item.title: v3.55.0
item.description: - Add new model: Arcee Trinity Large Preview - Add new model: Moonshot Kimi K2.5 - Add MCP prompts support - prompts from connected MCP servers now appear in slash command autocomplete as /mcp: : **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/cline/cline/compare/v3.54.0...v3.55.0

item.title: v3.54.0
item.description: ### Added - Native tool calls support for Ollama provider - Sonnet 4.5 is now the default Amazon Bedrock model id ### Fixed - Prevent infinite retry loops when replace_in_file fails repeatedly. The system now detects repeated failures and provides better guidance to break out of retry cycles. - Skip diff error UI handling during streaming to prevent flickering. Error handling is deferred until streaming completes. - Strip notebook cell outputs when extracting text content from Jupyter notebooks, significantly reducing context size sent to the LLM. - Throttle diff view updates during streaming to reduce UI flickering and improve performance. ### Changed - Removed Mistral's Devstral-2512 free from the free models list - Removed deprecated zai-glm-4.6 model from Cerebras provider **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/cline/cline/compare/v3.53.1...v3.54.0

item.title: v3.53.1
item.description: ### Fixed - Bug in responses API **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/cline/cline/compare/v3.53.0...v3.53.1

item.title: v3.53.0
item.description: ### Fixed - Removed grok model from free tier **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/cline/cline/compare/v3.52.0...v3.53.0

item.title: v3.51.0
item.description: ### Added - Adding OpenAI gpt-5.2-codex model to the model picker **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/cline/cline/compare/v3.50.0...v3.51.0

item.title: v3.50.0
item.description: ### Added - Add gpt-5.2-codex OpenAI model support - Add create-pull-request skill ### Fixed - Fix the selection of remotely configured providers - Fix act_mode_respond to prevent consecutive calls - Fix invalid tool call IDs when switching between model formats **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/cline/cline/compare/v3.49.1...v3.50.0

item.title: v3.49.1
item.description: ### Added - Add telemetry to track usage of skills feature - Add version headers to Cline backend requests - Phase in Responses API usage instead of defaulting for every supported model ### Fixed - Fix workflow slash command search to be case-insensitive - Fix model display in ModelPickerModal when using LiteLLM - Fix LiteLLM model fetching with default base URL - Fix crash when OpenAI-compatible APIs send usage chunks with empty or null choices arrays at end of streaming - Fix model ID for Kat Coder Pro Free model **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/cline/cline/compare/v3.49.0...v3.49.1

item.title: v3.49.0
item.description: - Enable configuring an OTEL collector at runtime - Removing Minimax-2.1 from free model list as the free trial has ended - Improved image display in MCP responses - Auto-sync remote MCP servers from remote config to local settings **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/cline/cline/compare/v3.48.0...v3.49.0

item.title: v3.48.0
item.description: ### Added - Add Skills system for reusable, on-demand agent instructions - Add new websearch tooling in Cline provider - Add zai-glm-4.7 to Cerebras model list - Add model refresh and improve reasoning support for Vercel AI Gateway ### Fixed - Revert #8341 due to regressions in diff view/document truncation (see #8423, #8429) - Fixed extension crash when using context menu selector **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/cline/cline/compare/v3.47.0...v3.48.0

item.title: v3.47.0
item.description: ### Added - Added experimental support for Background Edits (allows editing files in background without opening the diff view) - Updated free model to MiniMax M2.1 (replacing MiniMax M2) - Added support for Azure based identity authentication in OpenAI Compatible provider and Azure OpenAI - Add supportsReasoning property to Baseten models ### Fixed - Prevent expired token usage in authenticated requests - Exclude binary files without extensions from diffs - Preserve file endings and trailing newlines - Fix Cerebras rate limiting - Fix Auto Compact for Claude Code provider - Make Workspace and Favorites history filters independent - Fix remote MCP server connection failures (404 response handling) - Disable native tool calling for Deepseek 3.2 speciale - Show notification instead of opening sidebar on update - Fix Baseten model selector ### Refactored - Modify prompts for parallel tool usage in Claude and Gemini 3 models **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/cline/cline/compare/v3.46.1...v3.47.0

item.title: v3.46.1
item.description: ### Fixed - Remove GLM 4.6 from free models **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/cline/cline/compare/v3.46.0...v3.46.1

item.title: v3.46.0
item.description: ### Added - Added GLM 4.7 model - Enhanced background terminal execution with command tracking, log file output, zombie process prevention (10-minute timeout), and clickable log paths in UI - Apply Patch tool for GPT-5+ models (replacing current diff edit tools) ### Fixed - Duplicate error messages during streaming for Diff Edit tool when Parallel Tool Calling is not enabled - Banner carousel styling and dismiss functionality - Typos in Gemini system prompt overrides - Model picker favorites ordering, star toggle, and keyboard navigation for OpenRouter and Vercel AI Gateway providers - Fetch remote config values from the cache ### Refactored - Anthropic handler to use metadata for reasoning support - Bedrock provider to use metadata for reasoning support **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/cline/cline/compare/v3.45.0...v3.46.0

item.title: v3.45.1
item.description: - Fixed MCP settings race condition where toggling auto-approve or changing timeout settings would cause the UI to flash and revert **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/cline/cline/compare/...v3.45.1

item.title: v3.45.0
item.description: ## What's Changed * feat: add new model configuration by @abeatrix in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/8142 * feat: add Gemini 3 Flash Preview model to model picker and banner by @arafatkatze in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/8160 * Changeset version bump by @github-actions[bot] in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/8159 **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/cline/cline/compare/v3.44.2...v3.45.0

item.title: v3.44.2
item.description: ## What's Changed - Polished the model picker UI with checkmarks for selected models, tooltips on Plan/Act tabs, and consistent arrow pointers across all popup modals - Improved WhatsNew modal responsiveness and cleaned up redundant UI elements - Fixed GLM models outputting garbled text in thinking tags—reasoning is now properly disabled for these models **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/cline/cline/compare/v3.44.1...v3.44.2

item.title: v3.44.1
item.description: ## What's Changed - Fixed a critical bug where local MCP servers stopped connecting after v3.42.0—all user-configured stdio-based MCP servers should now work again - Fixed remotely configured API keys not being extracted correctly for enterprise users - Added support for dynamic tool instructions that adapt based on runtime context, laying groundwork for future context-aware features **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/cline/cline/compare/v3.44.0...v3.44.1

item.title: v3.44.0
item.description: ## What's Changed * feat: update banner for version 3.44.0 by @arafatkatze in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/8139 **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/cline/cline/compare/v3.43.1...v3.44.0

item.title: v3.43.1
item.description: ## What's Changed ### Added - GLM-4.6 - kat-coder-pro - Add parsing of env variable patterns to the mcpconfig.json ### Fixed - updated OpenRouter model ID from zai to z-ai for GLM-4.6 by @arafatkatze in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/8138 - TLS Proxy support issues for VSCode - Add supportsReasoning flag to OpenAI reasoning models - Fix thinking not available for some models in the OpenAI provider - Fix invalid signature field issues when switching between Gemini and Anthropic providers - Extract OpenRouter model filtering into reusable utility and use it in different model pickers - Fix a11y for auto approve checkbox - Improve ModelPickerModal provider list layout ### Refactored - Migrate WhatsNewModal to new shared dialogue component **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/cline/cline/compare/v3.43.0...v3.43.1

item.title: v3.42.0
item.description: ## What's Changed * Refactor Terminal Module by @arafatkatze in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7966 * expose a getAvailableSlashCommands rpc endpoint in cline core by @maxpaulus43 in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/8024 * feat: Make extension use new banner api, keep providers for extension side rules eval by @cryptoque in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/8022 * chore: make expanding/collapsing ui components accessible by @jgellin-sf in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7828 * accessibility: screen reader support for slash and context menus by @mingxuanzhangsfdx in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7832 * fix: extract OpenRouter model filtering into reusable utility and use it different model pickers by @arafatkatze in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/8064 * fix: update OpenRouter model ID and filter logic for devstral-2512 by @arafatkatze in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/8065 * Changeset version bump by @github-actions[bot] in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/8052 ## New Contributors * @jgellin-sf made their first contribution in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7828 * @mingxuanzhangsfdx made their first contribution in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7832 **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/cline/cline/compare/v3.41.0...v3.42.0

item.title: v3.41.0
item.description: ## What's Changed * feat(prompt): add command output limiting guidance to capabilities by @saoudrizwan in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7884 * remote config - add litellm provider by @celestial-vault in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7775 * Prevent simultaneous refreshes when restoring auth info by @BarreiroT in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7835 * feat: remove mcp enable setting for individual users by @cryptoque in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7879 * feat: enable native tool calling for deepseek 3.2 [AI-27] by @abeatrix in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7877 * Revert "feat(prompt): add command output limiting guidance to capabilities" by @saoudrizwan in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7909 * feat: add OpenAI Response API support and Codex model compatibility [CLIENTS-24] by @abeatrix in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7912 * fix(ollama): abort streaming requests when task is cancelled by @robinnewhouse in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7907 * fix context rewriting for native tool call format by @0xToshii in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7882 * docs: add contributing guide for model family [CLIENTS-32] by @abeatrix in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7916 * context rewriting test cases by @0xToshii in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7923 * removing unused legacy context manager by @0xToshii in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7924 * JB Integration Workflow: use pull_request_target to support remote remote PRs by @Garoth in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7917 * Redesign model settings page with compact info and Advanced section by @nickbaumann98 in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7862 * dev: add stories for all UI components by @abeatrix in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7905 * cleanup taskhistory recovery by @celestial-vault in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7889 * feat: remove mcp marketplace enable setting from cli by @cryptoque in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7911 * docs(hooks): Correct the directory mentioned for global hooks dir by @candieduniverse in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7933 * add DeepSeek V3.2 to static models list by @AlexKer in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7934 * display completion messages in processStateUpdate by @maxpaulus43 in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7939 * Refactor openai-native.ts switch statement to use model metadata by @robinnewhouse in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7920 * feat: remote config - add vertex provider by @cryptoque in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7913 * fix: restore cost calculation for Anthropic API requests by @saoudrizwan in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7943 * refactor: require native tool call for Responses API by @abeatrix in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7953 * feat(terminal): Move Standalone terminal Code to Typescript by @arafatkatze in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7927 * fix(hooks): Want TaskCancel to trigger properly by @candieduniverse in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7952 * fix(security): set restrictive file permissions for secrets.json by @Richardmsbr in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7782 * feat: welcome screen ui enhancements by @trupix in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7878 * Move terminal impls into the correct package. by @sjf in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7970 * adding webtools to the features menu by @0xToshii in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7566 * updating webfetch and integrating new handler by @0xToshii in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7509 * adding websearch and integrating new handler by @0xToshii in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7514 * adding handler for websearch in cli by @0xToshii in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7570 * updating prompt tests for websearch by @0xToshii in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7976 * Refactor OpenAI native handler to use metadata for model capabilities by @robinnewhouse in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7947 * Add Amazon Nova 2 Lite support by @ajjuaire in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7987 * show mcp messages in cli output by @maxpaulus43 in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7989 * Add the cline distribution type to the telemetry by @sjf in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7940 * adding minimal ui for search usage by @0xToshii in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7996 * add feature flag check to webtool handlers by @0xToshii in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7997 * feat(hooks): Enable hooks in the CLI [ENG-1375] by @candieduniverse in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7948 * Log session information by @BarreiroT in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7944 * feat(hooks): Implement PreCompact hook [ENG-1005] by @candieduniverse in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7513 * Add loaders to login buttons by @BarreiroT in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7945 * feat(banners): add dismiss functionality to banner carousel by @arafatkatze in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7982 * broken link fixed by @kunstewi in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7986 * Removing unused file in Dify Provider by @arafatkatze in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7968 * feat: hide whats new modal header image for now by @trupix in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/8009 * fix: make initial checkpoint commit non-blocking but block unsafe tools [#AI-26] by @robinnewhouse in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/8008 * feat: configure Litellm API key with remote config by @cryptoque in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7937 * feature: xmas special santa cline by @trupix in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/8010 * Don't enable gRPC debug logs in the cli by @sjf in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/8013 * Refactor Vertex provider to use metadata for model capabilities by @robinnewhouse in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7999 * fix: only send thinking params to Gemini models that support them by @robinnewhouse in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/8014 * fix: prevent logout on network errors during token refresh by @saoudrizwan in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/8021 * Enterprise docs by @jl-codes in item.title: v3.40.0
item.description: ## What's Changed * remove unused sentry dependency by @celestial-vault in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7823 * add atomic file write by @celestial-vault in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7754 * feat: set default thinking level for Gemini 3 Pro models by @abeatrix in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7831 * set the cli's 'ide version' to just the cli version rather than being blank, to make environment_history work for CLI by @Garoth in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7712 * feat: add mode and token metrics info to storage messages [CLIENTS-26] by @abeatrix in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7795 * fix(bedrock): add sts client userAgentAppId by @jackrein in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7719 * correctly handle new and old tool call formats for context rewriting by @0xToshii in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7809 * feat: apply_patch auto approve by @canvrno in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7777 * Don't log otel events to the console because they are really spammy by @sjf in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7841 * added subpages and content to hooks by @jl-codes in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7797 * fix: OpenAI Response API message format by @abeatrix in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7842 * markdown styling fix by @pashpashpash in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7840 * Fix changeset converter by @arafatkatze in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7851 * docs: remove Advanced Patterns and Testing & Debugging from Hooks docs by @jl-codes in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7869 * Revert "readTaskHistory - don't return empty array on parse failure" by @saoudrizwan in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7874 * support multi-index search over inner messages to find file mentions for context rewriting by @0xToshii in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7850 * feat: add auto-recovery for corrupted task history state by @abeatrix in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7875 * fix: consolidate successive error retry messages in chat UI by @saoudrizwan in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7880 * Changeset version bump by @github-actions[bot] in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7865 ## New Contributors * @jackrein made their first contribution in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7719 * @jl-codes made their first contribution in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7797 **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/cline/cline/compare/v3.39.2...v3.40.0

item.title: v3.39.0
item.description: ## What's Changed * fix: unblock opening a task when using cline account by @saoudrizwan in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7715 * Add Claude Code GitHub Workflow by @saoudrizwan in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7717 * Check for API key and base URL before fetching LiteLLM models. by @celestial-vault in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7713 * View remote rules and workflows in the editor by @celestial-vault in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7702 * Add fixed header to ClineRulesToggleModal by @celestial-vault in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7729 * Asksage usage fetch models by @luna-asksage in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7329 * Fix API request badge causing text to wrap when hidden by @saoudrizwan in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7739 * Add shell option for cmd.exe to prevent double quote escaping by @dltechy in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7630 * Add sticky user message header for better navigation by @saoudrizwan in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7749 * Allow slash commands anywhere in message input by @saoudrizwan in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7760 * Add find-pr-reviewers and address-pr-comments workflows by @saoudrizwan in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7761 * Instruct AI to prefer non-interactive commands by @saoudrizwan in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7762 * add case for skipping autoCondense in truncation function call by @0xToshii in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7763 * readTaskHistory - don't return empty array on parse failure by @celestial-vault in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7773 * feat(cli): add active task check before entering follow mode by @arafatkatze in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7745 * Docs/task history recovery by @juanpflores in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7776 * fix(ui): Add bottom padding for last message item [ENG-1354] by @abeatrix in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7787 * fix(ui): memoize highlighted text [ENG-1355] by @abeatrix in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7786 * running context rewriting prior to running auto compact by @0xToshii in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7774 * Add support for Banner dismissal, event logging by @cryptoque in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7642 * feat: add tabbed model picker with Recommended and Free tabs by @nickbaumann98 in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7769 * feat: add direct navigation to settings sections by @arafatkatze in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7770 * fix: move OptionsButtons outside WithCopyButton component by @arafatkatze in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7783 * Add CLI context window configuration docs by @mintlify[bot] in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7796 * fix(hooks): Polish for UserPromptSubmit [ENG-1345] by @candieduniverse in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7656 * add enterprise to readme by @reneehuang1 in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7589 * Added microwave family system prompt configuration by @canvrno in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7798 * Log the name of the telemetry provider(s) enabled in the extension by @sjf in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7799 * Enable NTC by default by @arafatkatze in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7804 * Adding Stealth model by @arafatkatze in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7764 * Rearrange models by @arafatkatze in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7808 * feat: add Explain Changes feature for code review by @saoudrizwan in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7765 * Remove auto approve menu popups by @arafatkatze in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7806 * fix: move notification toggle to auto-approve menu by @saoudrizwan in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7812 * fix: Standalone, ensure cwd is the install dir to find resources reliably by @dominiccooney in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7781 * v3.39.0 Release Notes by @arafatkatze in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7813 ## New Contributors * @luna-asksage made their first contribution in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7329 * @dltechy made their first contribution in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7630 * @mintlify[bot] made their first contribution in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7796 * @reneehuang1 made their first contribution in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7589 **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/cline/cline/compare/v3.38.3...v3.39.0

item.title: v3.38.3
item.description: ## What's Changed * feat: add support for Responses API for openai-native provider [ENG-1227] [ENG-1311] by @abeatrix in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7504 * fix: rules modal positioning by @abeatrix in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7546 * fix: await presentAssistantMessage calls to prevent race condition by @abeatrix in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7548 * feat(hooks): Implement TaskComplete hook by @candieduniverse in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7510 * fix(task): update UI with final usage after stream completion by @abeatrix in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7552 * feat: Enable native tool calling for Baseten and Kimi K2 models by @abeatrix in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7562 * feat: add kimi-k2-thinking and kimi-k2-thinking-turbo by @CellenLee in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7386 * fix(api): attach reasoning details to tool blocks by @abeatrix in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7567 * cleaning up webfetch handler in cli by @0xToshii in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7571 * chore: clear onboarding models on deactivate by @abeatrix in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7569 * ApiHandler - Openrouter - Automatically derive modelInfo by @celestial-vault in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7568 * fix: disable switch for remote disabled rules [CLINE-154] by @abeatrix in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7580 * added Kimi K2 Thinking to static models list and set as default by @AlexKer in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7511 * fix: parse mentions/commands in tool results and before auto-condense by @abeatrix in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7575 * Add thinking level setting for Gemini 3.0 Pro by @canvrno in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7539 * updated baseten docs to include kimi instructions and updated location by @AlexKer in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7588 * feat(storybook): add OnboardingView story by @abeatrix in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7578 * feat: replace robot icon with custom cline-bot icon font by @abeatrix in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7594 * Add ApiKeys as remote config and expose the providers list by @BarreiroT in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7595 * feat(hooks): Implement Hooks tab in Rules & Workflows modal [ENG-1325] by @candieduniverse in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7547 * fix(compaction): Use consistent icon for compaction by @candieduniverse in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7598 * fix: improve error handling and ui for auth failures by @abeatrix in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7591 * Add support for Perplexity sonar and sonar-pro models to SAP AI Core Provider by @tjandy98 in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7605 * Add a setting to disable the Add Remote Servers feature in the extension. by @sjf in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7612 * chore: clean up prompts and fix model family identifier by @abeatrix in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7614 * Upgrade/workflows docs by @juanpflores in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7593 * fix: ensure reasoning signature is accessible at top level by @abeatrix in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7615 * feat: implement edit tools conversion adapter [CLIENTS-23] by @abeatrix in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7601 * Add Claude Opus 4.5 by @saoudrizwan in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7648 * Add support for opus 4.5 global endpoint in bedrock by @saoudrizwan in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7653 * fix: feature-flags cache persistence during auth transitions by @abeatrix in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7652 * fix: add a refresh guard flag for auth by @abeatrix in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7654 * Creates and Refactor Enterprise Docs by @juanpflores in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7365 * fix: improve error property extraction from nested response objects by @abeatrix in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7669 * maint: npm audit fix for glob package vulnerability by @canvrno in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7661 * Remove TaskTimeline from TaskHeader by @saoudrizwan in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7670 * Enhance text overflow handling in TaskHeader component by @saoudrizwan in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7674 * feat(telemetry): Add OpenTelemetry metrics infrastructure by @auroter in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7211 * Remind models of new_task tool parameters when deep_planning is invoked by @canvrno in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7685 * chore:npm audit fix docs + webview by @canvrno in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7687 * docs: Document proxy settings. by @dominiccooney in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7637 * fix: Add proxy rules, proxy support for McpHub & others by @dominiccooney in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7659 * Fixed SAP AI Core Deployments Mode by @schardosin in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7675 * LiteLLM provider dynamic model fetching by @celestial-vault in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7679 * fix(terminal): simplify cmd.exe command arguments by @arafatkatze in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7695 * feat: update Cerebras models and speed by @sebastiand-cerebras in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7631 * feat(providers): add thinking level config to Vertex and Anthropic model support by @abeatrix in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7701 * Remove native tool calling feature flag by @canvrno in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7704 * Adding Grok 4.1 and Grok Code to Cline by @carlesso in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7632 * LiteLLM - refresh models when baseurl changes by @celestial-vault in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7705 * Add os/cline-ver/host-info to task metadata & change "Task History -> EXPORT" to just open the task directory by @Garoth in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7706 * feat(context): add context window error detection for vercel ai gateway by @shaper in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7623 * fix(hooks): Fix issue identified by linter in proto file by @candieduniverse in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7707 * Changelog and announcement banner by @canvrno in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7711 ## New Contributors * @sebastiand-cerebras made their first contribution in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7631 * @carlesso made their first contribution in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7632 **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/cline/cline/compare/v3.38.1...v3.38.3

item.title: v3.38.0
item.description: ## What's Changed * adding state variable for clineWebToolsEnabled (noop) by @0xToshii in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7455 * feat: upgrade sap ai-sdk-js packages major version by @yuvalman in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/6547 * Retire firebase authentication by @tseglevskiy in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7362 * Fix: Added stronger prompting around the use of act_mode_respond by @canvrno in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7448 * fix:SAP provider type error - See PR #6547 by @canvrno in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7475 * feat: support feature flag payload & remote dynamic onboarding model list by @abeatrix in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7454 * fix(hooks): Reorder the UI elements so that PreToolUse appears above tool by @candieduniverse in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7449 * Maint: package updates by @canvrno in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7477 * Remove new_task from system prompts by @canvrno in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7350 * refactor(api): unify provider message type with ClineStorageMessage by @abeatrix in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7478 * fix(hooks): Honor "cancel": true in hook JSON output by @candieduniverse in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7479 * fix openrouter defaulting modelId when modelInfo is not present by @celestial-vault in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7482 * fix(account): memoize credits history table component by @abeatrix in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7439 * fix: improve layout and styling in OnboardingView component for small width viewport by @saoudrizwan in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7391 * Fix: Vercel provider token usage by @arafatkatze in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7481 * fix(hooks): Fix two minor cancel-resume issues by @candieduniverse in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7502 * fix: correct TaskTimeline height by @abeatrix in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7520 * fix: do not add MCP tool with invalid names as native tools by @abeatrix in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7516 * fix: ensure tool arguments are streamed during native tool calling [ENG-1305] by @abeatrix in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7508 * fix: remove automatic native tool calls inference by @abeatrix in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7522 * fix: remove h-full from TaskTimeline by @abeatrix in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7525 * feat(bedrock): add context window error detection and retry handling by @arafatkatze in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7515 * Add Gemini 3.0 to Gemini provider by @canvrno in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7533 * Feat: Gemini 3.0 prompt/tool changes by @canvrno in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7532 * fix( CLI auth): enable provider persistence when applying model changes by @arafatkatze in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7530 * Add Gemini 3.0 to featuredModels by @canvrno in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7537 * fix: resolve double quote escaping in Windows cmd.exe for Background Exec mode by @arafatkatze in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7523 * Fix cancellation for background terminal commands by @arafatkatze in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7521 * fix: Only update reasoning UI when content changes by @abeatrix in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7540 * feat: add thought signature support for Gemini SDK [ENG-1320] by @abeatrix in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7536 * feat: add Gemini 3.0 Pro to onboarding list by @abeatrix in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7542 * Changeset version bump by @github-actions[bot] in https://github.com/cline/cline/pull/7473 **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/cline/cline/compare/v3.37.1...v3.38.0

item.title: v3.37.1
